meaning: n.天鹅绒,柔软,光滑adj.天鹅绒的,柔软的,光滑的
examples: She was clad in blue velvet.
She was arrayed in a black velvet gown.
I taped the base of the feather onto the velvet.
Closer to Orchard Road, the giant Zouk and Velvet Underground are popular with Singaporean college students.
Alongside its vast comfort grub menu, local-made beers include light Lions Gate Lager and velvet-rich Heroica Oatmeal Stout.
